creator: jontheil@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Alexander Leidinger from comment #3)
# sh -x /usr/local/etc/rc.d/openhab status |& grep export
+ export RC_PID
+ git_daemon_flags='--syslog --verbose --reuseaddr --detach --export-all --base-path=/usr/local/var/db/git'
+ export 'OPENHAB_USER=openhab'
+ export 'OPENHAB_GROUP=openhab'
+ export 'OPENHAB_HTTP_PORT=8080'
+ export 'OPENHAB_HTTPS_PORT=8443'
+ export 'OPENHAB_HTTP_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0'
+ export 'OPENHAB_BACKUPS='
+ export 'EXTRA_JAVA_OPTS=-Dgnu.io.rxtx.SerialPorts=/dev/cuau0 -Dsun.nio.fs.watchservice=polling '
+ export 'OPENHAB_HOME=/usr/local/libexec/openhab'
+ export 'OPENHAB_CONF=/usr/local/etc/openhab'
+ export 'OPENHAB_RUNTIME=/usr/local/libexec/openhab/runtime'
+ export 'OPENHAB_USERDATA=/var/db/openhab/userdata'
+ export 'OPENHAB_LOGDIR=/var/log/openhab'
+ export 'LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8'
+ export 'JAVA_VERSION=17'
